description_long: This is a mid-rise Parisian-style apartment building with four main stories and an attic level, featuring a steeply pitched dark gray mansard roof with multiple brick chimneys. The front facade is adorned with symmetrical windows, each framed by white trim and some with red-brown shutters, and the uppermost windows are set into ornate dormers. The ground floor includes a commercial space with a sign reading 'CAMERA' above two large garage doors and a single entry door. The building's exterior walls are a warm beige color, with a gray base and white cornices separating each floor. The sides and rear of the building are plain, lacking windows or decorative elements, emphasizing the ornate front. The overall structure is solid and robust, typical of urban residential blocks found in European city centers.
description: A Parisian-style apartment building with a decorative front facade, mansard roof, and ground-floor commercial space. The sides and rear are plain, while the front features ornate windows and red-brown shutters.
description_view_0: Front view showing ornate windows, red-brown shutters, a mansard roof, and a ground-floor commercial space labeled 'CAMERA'.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain beige wall with no windows or decorative features, and the sloped roof with visible chimneys.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain beige wall with no windows or architectural details, and the continuation of the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain beige wall and visible chimneys on the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns across the front facade, with each floor featuring evenly spaced windows aligned horizontally and vertically. The uppermost floor has three dormer windows set into the roof, while the lower floors have rectangular windows with some featuring shutters.
